mapper.select: select tran_id as tranId, frm_account_no as frmAccountNo, to_account_no as toAccountNo, tran_amt as tranAmt, date_format(tran_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as tranDt from transaction_history where frm_account_no = #{accountNo} or to_account_no = #{accountNo} order by tran_dt desc
mapper.insert: insert into transaction_history (frm_account_no, to_account_no, tran_amt) values (#{frmAccountNo}, #{toAccountNo}, #{tranAmt})
